heading: Coast Guard cross
label: 2735 Coast Guard cross
notes: Amendments2021— substituted “an individual” for “a person” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 491a of this title
amendments: Amendments2021— substituted “an individual” for “a person” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 491a of this title

children.text: while engaged in an action against an enemy of the United States;
while engaged in military operations involving conflict with an opposing foreign force or international terrorist organization; or
while serving with friendly foreign forces engaged in an armed conflict against an opposing armed force in which the United States is not a belligerent party.
